title: Token collection to export
description: Only tokens from the collection with this name are exported. Defaults to the semantic color collection.

title: Show generated-file disclaimer
description: When enabled, a comment noting that the file was generated automatically and should not be edited by hand is added to every generated file.

title: Base output directory
description: Base directory (relative to the export root) where generated files are placed.

title: Colors sub-path
description: Sub-path under the base directory for the generated color file.

title: Color file name
description: File name (without .dart extension) for the generated color file.
